name: matami-food-platform
description: Mat'ami — Professional multi-restaurant food ordering platform with full admin dashboard

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w artifacts/api-server" "npm run dev -w artifacts/food-ordering"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -ws --if-present
scripts.build:railway: npm run build -w artifacts/food-ordering && npm run build -w artifacts/api-server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck -w artifacts/food-ordering && npm run typecheck -w artifacts/api-server && npm run typecheck -w scripts
